head_commit.message:
Remove #[axplat_macros::def_plat_interface] (#46)

* [feat] remove axplat_macros::def_plat_interface

It can be replaced with `crate_interface::def_interface(gen_caller)`
with crate_interface >= 0.2.0

* [chore] bump version of axplat

axplat 0.3.0 -> 0.4.0
axplat_macros 0.1.0 -> 0.2.0
cargo-axplat 0.2.5 -> 0.3.0
